    Merge branch 'pratheekshap/v2.5.2_release' into 'main'
    
    Correct gdrcopy.spec changelog dates for v2.5.2 release

+++ b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
@@ -365,7 +365,7 @@ rm -rf $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}

author: Pak Markthub
message: Update CHANGELOG.md
patch:
commit a16d2cb7486bbab8aae1afbb2955728e47a3ffe8
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>

    Update CHANGELOG.md

+++ b/CHANGELOG.md
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@
 - Support the CDMM mode.
 - Support Blackwell.
 - Fix errors when compiling with CUDA 12.6.
+- Fix build-deb-packages.sh to always create .deb with deb versions in the filenames.
 
 ## [2.5] - 2025-03-21

author: Pak Markthub
message: Fix build-deb-packages.sh to always create deb files in <major/minor/patch ver>-<debver> format
patch:
commit f045ba29e3785a982ea251059f94dce1240ad453
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Aug 6 16:58:25 2025 +0000

    Fix build-deb-packages.sh to always create deb files in <major/minor/patch ver>-<debver> format
---
 packages/build-deb-packages.sh | 13 ++++++++-----
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
index 8e4b165..1ab6fb4 100755
--- a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
@@ -241,12 +241,15 @@ ex cd ${CWD}
 for item in `ls ${tmpdir}/*.deb`; do
     item_name=`basename $item`
     item_name=`echo $item_name | sed -e "s/\.deb//g"`
-    if echo "$item_name" | grep -q "tests"; then
-        item_name="${item_name}${release}+cuda${CUDA_MAJOR}.${CUDA_MINOR}.deb"
-    else
-        item_name="${item_name}${release}.deb"
+    item_base_name=`echo ${item_name} | cut -d"_" -f1`
+    item_arch_name=`echo ${item_name} | cut -d"_" -f3`
+    output_base_name="${item_base_name}_${VERSION}-${DEBIAN_VERSION}_${item_arch_name}${release}"
+    output_name="${output_base_name}"
+    if echo "$item_base_name" | grep -q "tests"; then
+        output_name="${output_name}+cuda${CUDA_MAJOR}.${CUDA_MINOR}"
     fi
-    ex cp $item ./${item_name}
+    output_name="${output_name}.deb"
+    ex cp $item ./${output_name}
 done
 ex cp ${tmpdir}/*.tar.* .
 ex cp ${tmpdir}/*.dsc .

author: Pak Markthub
message: Rename SUB_VERSION to PATCH_VERSION
patch:
commit b52a9c75103e18949c8666edd46e53b327044b8c
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Aug 4 20:34:24 2025 +0000

    Rename SUB_VERSION to PATCH_VERSION
---
 packages/build-deb-packages.sh | 8 ++++----
 packages/build-rpm-packages.sh | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
index b7489e8..8e4b165 100755
--- a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
 # Restart this number at 1 if MAJOR_VERSION or MINOR_VERSION changes
 # See https://www.debian.org/doc/debian-policy/ch-controlfields.html#version
 DEBIAN_VERSION=1
-SUB_VERSION=1
+PATCH_VERSION=1
 
 SCRIPT_DIR_PATH="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")")" && pwd)"
 TOP_DIR_PATH="${SCRIPT_DIR_PATH}/.."
@@ -98,8 +98,8 @@ MODULE_SUBDIR=$(awk '/MODULE_SUBDIR \?=/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/src/gdrdr
 MAJOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 MINOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 
-if [ "X$SUB_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
-    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.${SUB_VERSION}"
+if [ "X$PATCH_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
+    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.${PATCH_VERSION}"
 else
     VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}"
 fi
@@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ if [ "X$VERSION" == "X" ]; then
     exit 1
 fi
 
-if [ "X$SUB_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
+if [ "X$PATCH_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
     FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}"
 else
     FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}-${DEBIAN_VERSION}"
diff --git a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
index 30efd6e..c08ccfd 100755
--- a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
 # Restart this number at 1 if MAJOR_VERSION or MINOR_VERSION changes
 # See https://rpm-packaging-guide.github.io/#preamble-items
 RPM_VERSION=1
-SUB_VERSION=1
+PATCH_VERSION=1
 
 SCRIPT_DIR_PATH="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")")" && pwd)"
 TOP_DIR_PATH="${SCRIPT_DIR_PATH}/.."
@@ -94,8 +94,8 @@ MODULE_SUBDIR=$(awk '/MODULE_SUBDIR \?=/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/src/gdrdr
 MAJOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 MINOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 
-if [ "X$SUB_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
-    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.${SUB_VERSION}"
+if [ "X$PATCH_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
+    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.${PATCH_VERSION}"
 else
     VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}"
 fi

author: Pak Markthub
message: Add compile-time compat check for the nv-p2p version gdrdrv is expected vs the nv-p2p version we compile agaist
patch:
commit a347ab2c02fee9fad8d399be4ef88489ebab6c05
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jun 27 20:25:43 2025 +0000

    Add compile-time compat check for the nv-p2p version gdrdrv is expected vs the nv-p2p version we compile agaist
---
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c | 8 ++++++++
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
index f8c7400..59e1a11 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
@@ -292,6 +292,14 @@ static inline bool gdr_pfn_is_ram(unsigned long pfn)
 #define GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR1_MIN_VERSION 0x00010003
 #define GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR2_MIN_VERSION 0x00020000
 
+#define GDRDRV_REQ_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_MAJOR1_MIN_VERSION 0x00010000
+#define GDRDRV_REQ_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_MAJOR2_MIN_VERSION 0x00020000
+
+#if !(GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_REQ_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_MAJOR1_MIN_VERSION) || \
+     GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_REQ_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_MAJOR2_MIN_VERSION))
+#error "The gdrdrv code is not compatible with the nv-p2p API you are compiling against."
+#endif
+
 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 #define DEVNAME "gdrdrv"

author: Pak Markthub
message: Make the CDMM handle code compat with nv-p2p v2.0
patch:
commit 9a6439a6f48e344c9525b71995a604faa645483d
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Jun 27 20:25:16 2025 +0000

    Make the CDMM handle code compat with nv-p2p v2.0
---
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c | 6 ++++--
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
index 2a3984b..f8c7400 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
@@ -289,7 +289,8 @@ static inline bool gdr_pfn_is_ram(unsigned long pfn)
 #define GDRDRV_BUILT_FOR_NVIDIA_FLAVOR_STRING "proprietary"
 #endif
 
-#define GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_MODE_MIN_VERSION 0x00010003
+#define GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR1_MIN_VERSION 0x00010003
+#define GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR2_MIN_VERSION 0x00020000
 
 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
@@ -390,7 +391,8 @@ static inline bool gdr_mr_supports_cache_mapping(gdr_mr_t *mr)
 
     if (mr && mr->page_table && mr->page_table->entries > 0) {
         ret = gdr_pfn_is_ram(mr->page_table->pages[0]->physical_address >> PAGE_SHIFT);
-#if GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_MODE_MIN_VERSION)
+#if GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR1_MIN_VERSION) || \
+    GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_FLAGS_MAJOR2_MIN_VERSION)
         // Under the CDMM mode, gdr_pfn_is_ram may return false. However, cache mappings are still supported.
         ret |= !!(mr->page_table->flags & NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_FLAGS_CPU_CACHEABLE);
 #endif

index 54984d5..b7489e8 100755
--- a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
 # Restart this number at 1 if MAJOR_VERSION or MINOR_VERSION changes
 # See https://www.debian.org/doc/debian-policy/ch-controlfields.html#version
 DEBIAN_VERSION=1
+SUB_VERSION=1
 
 SCRIPT_DIR_PATH="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")")" && pwd)"
 TOP_DIR_PATH="${SCRIPT_DIR_PATH}/.."
@@ -96,12 +97,22 @@ MODULE_SUBDIR=$(awk '/MODULE_SUBDIR \?=/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/src/gdrdr
 
 MAJOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 MINOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
-VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}"
+
+if [ "X$SUB_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
+    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.${SUB_VERSION}"
+else
+    VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}"
+fi
 if [ "X$VERSION" == "X" ]; then
     echo "Failed to get version numbers!" >&2
     exit 1
 fi
-FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}-${DEBIAN_VERSION}"
+
+if [ "X$SUB_VERSION" != "X" ]; then
+    FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}"
+else
+    FULL_VERSION="${VERSION}-${DEBIAN_VERSION}"
+fi
 
 tmpdir=`mktemp -d /tmp/gdr.XXXXXX`
 if [ ! -d "${tmpdir}" ]; then

author: Pak Markthub
message: Fix bug in gdrdrv/Makefile caused by shell param expansion
patch:
commit f31b686b0188a0410b55980b4094eef8aaf01291
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri May 23 00:40:45 2025 +0800

    Fix bug in gdrdrv/Makefile caused by shell param expansion
---
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile | 11 ++++++++---
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index 18d9ac1..b9c4569 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -49,11 +49,16 @@ MODULE_DESTDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/$(MODULE_SUBDIR)
 DEPMOD := /sbin/depmod
 
 export NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
-export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+
+# On RHEL10, shell with $(PARAMS) is not properly expanded. Use := to force expansion.
+_NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE := $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(_NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE)
 
 CONF_SCRIPT_DIR ?= $(PWD)/../../scripts
-export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
-export HAVE_PROC_OPS ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh -k $(KVER))
+_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET := $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
+export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET ?= $(_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET)
+_HAVE_PROC_OPS := $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh -k $(KVER))
+export HAVE_PROC_OPS ?= $(_HAVE_PROC_OPS)
 
 all: build

message: Improve comments
patch:
commit aa713073c21be0f599ffafdeab9fc709fad084df
Author: Pratheeksha Prasad <pratheekshap@nvidia.com>

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
index fb7b05f..3b02c21 100755
--- a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "12.0"; then
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 90"
 fi
 
-# Add all supported architectures if CUDA >= 12.6
+# For CUDA >= 12.6, enable all supported architectures since this is the first version where nvcc drops sm50 support, and pplat requires atomics (available only in sm60+)
 if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "12.6"; then
     echo "-arch=all"
     exit 0

author: Pratheeksha Prasad
message: Refactor get_cuda_gencode - compare full cuda versions, -arch=all from cuda 12.6
patch:
commit 2b01d93110663cd113e75421ca40f8fcf96fce1b
Author: Pratheeksha Prasad <pratheekshap@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed May 21 22:49:59 2025 +0000

    Refactor get_cuda_gencode - compare full cuda versions, -arch=all from cuda 12.6
---
 scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh | 32 ++++++++++++++------------------
 1 file changed, 14 insertions(+), 18 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
index 094fa3f..fb7b05f 100755
--- a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -4,16 +4,18 @@
 NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
 DIR="$(dirname "$0")"
 CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$($DIR/get_cuda_version.sh $NVCC)
-CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
-CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
 
 if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" ]; then
     echo "Error: Could not detect CUDA version" >&2
     exit 1
 fi
 
+version_ge() {
+    # returns 0 (true) if $1 >= $2, 1 (false) otherwise
+    [ "$(printf '%s\n' "$1" "$2" | sort -V | head -n1)" = "$2" ]
+}
 # Require CUDA >= 8.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -lt 8 ]; then
+if ! version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "8.0"; then
     echo "Error: CUDA version must be >= 8.0" >&2
     exit 1
 fi
@@ -23,45 +25,39 @@ COMPUTE_LIST="60 61 62"
 SM_LIST="60 61 62"
 
 # Add Volta (7.0) if CUDA >= 9.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 9 ]; then
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "9.0"; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 70 72"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 70 72"
 fi
 
 # Add Turing (7.5) if CUDA >= 10.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 10 ]; then
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "10.0"; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 75"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 75"
 fi
 
 # Add Ampere (8.0, 8.6, 8.7) if CUDA >= 11.1
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 11 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 1 ]; then
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "11.1"; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 80 86 87"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 80 86 87"
 fi
 
 # Add Ada Lovelace (8.9) if CUDA >= 11.8
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 11 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 8 ]; then
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "11.8"; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 89"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 89"
 fi
 
 # Add Hopper (9.0) if CUDA >= 12.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 12 ]; then
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "12.0"; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 90"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 90"
 fi
 
-# Add Blackwell (10.0 and 12.0) if CUDA >= 12.8
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 12 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 8 ]; then
-    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 100 120"
-    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 100 120"
-fi
-
-# Add Blackwell (12.0) if CUDA >= 12.8
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 12 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 8 ]; then
-    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 120"
-    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 120"
+# Add all supported architectures if CUDA >= 12.6
+if version_ge "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" "12.6"; then
+    echo "-arch=all"
+    exit 0
 fi
 
 # Generate NVCC flags

author: Pak Markthub
message: Introduce get_cuda_version.sh
patch:
commit 2ed74939d94fbed933e934a94ef687b599038b74
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri May 30 15:53:18 2025 +0000

    Introduce get_cuda_version.sh
---
 scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh |  5 +++--
 scripts/get_cuda_version.sh | 13 +++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 16 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
index 666d604..c4b569b 100755
--- a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -1,8 +1,9 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 
-# Get CUDA version from nvcc
+# Get CUDA version from get_cuda_version.sh
 NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
-CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$("$NVCC" --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/,.*//')
+DIR="$(dirname "$0")"
+CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$($DIR/get_cuda_version.sh $NVCC)
 CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
 CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
 
diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..86dcc68
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# Usage: ./get_cuda_version.sh [nvcc_path]
+NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
+CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$($NVCC --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/,.*//')
+CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
+CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
+
+if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" ]; then
+    echo "Error: Could not detect CUDA version" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "${CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR}.${CUDA_VERSION_MINOR}"
\ No newline at end of file

author: Pak Markthub
message: Fix bug in gdrdrv/Makefile caused by shell param expansion
patch:
commit a621884848db0a8e56f4bc04d27255e710b43346
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri May 23 00:40:45 2025 +0800

    Fix bug in gdrdrv/Makefile caused by shell param expansion
---
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile | 11 ++++++++---
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index 18d9ac1..b9c4569 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -49,11 +49,16 @@ MODULE_DESTDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/$(MODULE_SUBDIR)
 DEPMOD := /sbin/depmod
 
 export NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
-export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+
+# On RHEL10, shell with $(PARAMS) is not properly expanded. Use := to force expansion.
+_NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE := $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(_NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE)
 
 CONF_SCRIPT_DIR ?= $(PWD)/../../scripts
-export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
-export HAVE_PROC_OPS ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh -k $(KVER))
+_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET := $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
+export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET ?= $(_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET)
+_HAVE_PROC_OPS := $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh -k $(KVER))
+export HAVE_PROC_OPS ?= $(_HAVE_PROC_OPS)
 
 all: build

Date:   Tue May 20 05:00:40 2025 +0000

---

 3 files changed, 26 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
index 6d4b4bf..d191d78 100755
--- a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -1,8 +1,9 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 
-# Get CUDA version from nvcc
+# Get CUDA version from get_cuda_version.sh
 NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
-CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$("$NVCC" --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/,.*//')
+DIR="$(dirname "$0")"
+CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$($DIR/get_cuda_version.sh $NVCC)
 CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
 CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
 
diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..86dcc68
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_version.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# Usage: ./get_cuda_version.sh [nvcc_path]
+NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
+CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$($NVCC --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/,.*//')
+CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
+CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
+
+if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" ]; then
+    echo "Error: Could not detect CUDA version" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "${CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR}.${CUDA_VERSION_MINOR}"
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/tests/Makefile b/tests/Makefile
index 79f460b..fcb9f5e 100644
--- a/tests/Makefile
+++ b/tests/Makefile
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ DESTBIN ?=
 CUDA ?= /usr/local/cuda
 NVCC ?= $(CUDA)/bin/nvcc
 GET_CUDA_GENCODE ?= ../scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+GET_CUDA_VERSION ?= ../scripts/get_cuda_version.sh
 
 GDRAPI_INC := ../include
 GDRAPI_SRC := ../src
@@ -15,8 +16,16 @@ COMMONCFLAGS := -O2
 CFLAGS   += $(COMMONCFLAGS)
 CXXFLAGS += $(COMMONCFLAGS)
 
+CUDA_VERSION := $(shell $(GET_CUDA_VERSION) $(NVCC))
+CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR := $(shell echo $(CUDA_VERSION) | cut -d. -f1)
+CUDA_VERSION_MINOR := $(shell echo $(CUDA_VERSION) | cut -d. -f2)
+
+ifeq ($(shell [ $(CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR) -ge 13 ] && echo yes),yes)
+    NVCC_STD += --std=c++17
+endif
+
 # Get NVCC flags for compute capabilities from shell script
-NVCCFLAGS ?= $(shell $(GET_CUDA_GENCODE) $(NVCC))
+NVCCFLAGS ?= $(shell $(GET_CUDA_GENCODE) $(NVCC)) $(NVCC_STD)
 
 LIBS     := -lcuda -lpthread -ldl -lgdrapi

author: Pak Markthub
message: Support NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_FLAGS_CPU_CACHEABLE in gdrdrv
patch:
commit 8c250292df4ffd334b29899bc377c8fbab98c73f
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue May 13 20:22:06 2025 +0000

    Support NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_FLAGS_CPU_CACHEABLE in gdrdrv
---
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
index 614058e..fa3bf29 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
@@ -392,7 +392,7 @@ static inline bool gdr_does_mr_support_cache_mapping(gdr_mr_t *mr)
         ret = gdr_pfn_is_ram(mr->page_table->pages[0]->physical_address >> PAGE_SHIFT);
 #if GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE(NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_VERSION, GDRDRV_NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_WITH_MODE_MIN_VERSION)
         // Under the CDMM mode, gdr_pfn_is_ram may return false. However, cache mappings are still supported.
-        ret |= (mr->page_table->mode == NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_MODE_CDMM);
+        ret |= !!(mr->page_table->flags & NVIDIA_P2P_PAGE_TABLE_FLAGS_CPU_CACHEABLE);
 #endif
     }

author: Pratheeksha Prasad
message: Add support to create Kitmaker compliant build tarballs
patch:
commit 32232be800b003bda55c2f82b5d5601151ff2228
Author: Pratheeksha Prasad <pratheekshap@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu Apr 3 20:51:52 2025 +0000

    Add support to create Kitmaker compliant build tarballs
---
 Makefile | 47 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++---
 1 file changed, 44 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
index df38882..687bf9a 100644
--- a/Makefile
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -31,8 +31,8 @@ DESTINC = $(DESTDIR)$(includedir)
 
 CUDA ?= /usr/local/cuda
 
-LIB_MAJOR_VER ?= $(shell awk '/\#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $$3 }' include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
-LIB_MINOR_VER ?= $(shell awk '/\#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $$3 }' include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
+LIB_MAJOR_VER ?= $(shell awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $$3 }' include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
+LIB_MINOR_VER ?= $(shell awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $$3 }' include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 
 GDRAPI_ARCH := $(shell ./config_arch)
 GDRAPI_INC := ../include
@@ -42,6 +42,12 @@ LIB_BASENAME:=libgdrapi.so
 LIB_DYNAMIC=$(LIB_BASENAME).$(LIB_VER)
 LIB_SONAME=$(LIB_BASENAME).$(LIB_MAJOR_VER)
 
+# TODO: Dynamically pick OS and ARCH; Add LICENSE file for each tarball; Confirm dist_driver tarball
+ARCH := $(shell uname -m)
+OS := linux
+BUILD_DIR := build
+INSTALL_ROOT := $(BUILD_DIR)/install
+
 all: config driver lib exes
 
 version:
@@ -90,5 +96,40 @@ clean:
 	cd src/gdrdrv && \
 	$(MAKE) clean
 
-.PHONY: driver clean all lib exes lib_install drv_install exes_install install
+dist: dist-clean dist-prepare dist-lib dist-tests dist-driver
+	rm -rf $(INSTALL_ROOT)
+
+dist-prepare:
+	mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
+	mkdir -p $(INSTALL_ROOT)
+
+dist-lib: lib
+	mkdir -p $(INSTALL_ROOT)/libgdrapi/lib64
+	mkdir -p $(INSTALL_ROOT)/libgdrapi/include
+	cp src/$(LIB_DYNAMIC) $(INSTALL_ROOT)/libgdrapi/lib64/
+	cd $(INSTALL_ROOT)/libgdrapi/lib64 && \
+	ln -sf $(LIB_DYNAMIC) $(LIB_SONAME) && \
+	ln -sf $(LIB_SONAME) $(LIB_BASENAME)
+	cp include/*.h $(INSTALL_ROOT)/libgdrapi/include/
+	cd $(INSTALL_ROOT) && \
+	tar czf ../libgdrapi-$(OS)-$(ARCH)-$(LIB_VER).tar.gz libgdrapi/
+
+dist-tests: exes
+	mkdir -p $(INSTALL_ROOT)/gdrcopy-tests/bin
+	cp tests/gdrcopy_* $(INSTALL_ROOT)/gdrcopy-tests/bin/
+	cd $(INSTALL_ROOT) && \
+	tar czf ../gdrcopy-tests-$(OS)-$(ARCH)-$(LIB_VER).tar.gz gdrcopy-tests/
+
+dist-driver: driver
+	mkdir -p $(INSTALL_ROOT)/gdrdrv/src
+	cp src/gdrdrv/* $(INSTALL_ROOT)/gdrdrv/src/
+	cp packages/dkms.conf $(INSTALL_ROOT)/gdrdrv/
+	cd $(INSTALL_ROOT) && \
+	tar czf ../gdrdrv-$(OS)-$(ARCH)-$(LIB_VER).tar.gz gdrdrv/
+
+dist-clean:
+	rm -rf $(INSTALL_ROOT)
+	rm -rf $(BUILD_DIR)
+
+.PHONY: driver clean all lib exes lib_install drv_install exes_install install dist dist-prepare dist-lib dist-tests dist-driver dist-clean

author: Pak Markthub
message: Word smithing
patch:
commit 9240af02175f6388cf4030783e0085a306f4b3fb
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 25 03:24:04 2025 +0000

    Word smithing
---
 tests/copylat.cpp | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/tests/copylat.cpp b/tests/copylat.cpp
index 2558a03..f137f48 100644
--- a/tests/copylat.cpp
+++ b/tests/copylat.cpp
@@ -276,8 +276,8 @@ int main(int argc, char *argv[])
                     // move back to CPU (cold cache). gdr_copy_to_mapping will
                     // pay this cost.
 
-                    // We use sync memops. The memset is done when cuMemsetD8
-                    // returns.
+                    // We use sync memops. The memset is considered done by the
+                    // time cuMemsetD8 returns.
                     cuMemsetD8(d_A, 0, copy_size);
 
                     gdr_copy_to_mapping(mh, buf_ptr, init_buf, copy_size);
@@ -328,8 +328,8 @@ int main(int argc, char *argv[])
                     // to move back to CPU (cold cache). gdr_copy_from_mapping
                     // will pay this cost.
 
-                    // We use sync memops. The memset is done when cuMemsetD8
-                    // returns.
+                    // We use sync memops. The memset is considered done by the
+                    // time cuMemsetD8 returns.
                     cuMemsetD8(d_A, 0, copy_size);
 
                     gdr_copy_from_mapping(mh, h_buf, buf_ptr, copy_size);

author: Pak Markthub
message: Fix bug in scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
patch:
commit 7d44d622d5b225891826b9cafc1f1dd90daf4596
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 5 13:58:59 2025 -0800

    Fix bug in scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
---
 scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh | 50 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-----------
 1 file changed, 38 insertions(+), 12 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
index 8f025f4..666d604 100755
--- a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -2,39 +2,65 @@
 
 # Get CUDA version from nvcc
 NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
-CUDA_VERSION=$("$NVCC" --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/\..*//')
+CUDA_VERSION_FULL=$("$NVCC" --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/,.*//')
+CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f1)
+CUDA_VERSION_MINOR=$(echo "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" | cut -d'.' -f2)
 
-if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION" ]; then
+if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION_FULL" ]; then
     echo "Error: Could not detect CUDA version" >&2
     exit 1
 fi
 
+# Require CUDA >= 8.0
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -lt 8 ]; then
+    echo "Error: CUDA version must be >= 8.0" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
 # Initialize with Pascal architecture
 COMPUTE_LIST="60 61 62"
 SM_LIST="60 61 62"
 
 # Add Volta (7.0) if CUDA >= 9.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 9 ]; then
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 9 ]; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 70 72"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 70 72"
 fi
 
 # Add Turing (7.5) if CUDA >= 10.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 10 ]; then
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 10 ]; then
     COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 75"
     SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 75"
 fi
 
-# Add Ampere (8.0, 8.6) if CUDA >= 11.0
-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 11 ]; then
-    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 80 86"
-    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 80 86"
+# Add Ampere (8.0, 8.6, 8.7) if CUDA >= 11.1
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 11 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 1 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 80 86 87"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 80 86 87"
+fi
+
+# Add Ada Lovelace (8.9) if CUDA >= 11.8
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MAJOR" -ge 11 ] && [ "$CUDA_VERSION_MINOR" -ge 8 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 89"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 89"
+fi
+
+# Add Hopper (9.0) if CUDA >= 12.0

+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 100"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 100"
 fi

-if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 12 ]; then

author: Pak Markthub
message: Introduce scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
patch:
commit 12a9eb0fd100d60e1b4ee0ce0c5965a0da01d673
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 5 09:56:40 2025 -0800

    Introduce scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
---
 scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh | 50 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 tests/Makefile              |  6 +++++-
 2 files changed, 55 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..8f025f4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+
+# Get CUDA version from nvcc
+NVCC="${1:-nvcc}"
+CUDA_VERSION=$("$NVCC" --version | grep "release" | sed 's/.*release //' | sed 's/\..*//')
+
+if [ -z "$CUDA_VERSION" ]; then
+    echo "Error: Could not detect CUDA version" >&2
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+# Initialize with Pascal architecture
+COMPUTE_LIST="60 61 62"
+SM_LIST="60 61 62"
+
+# Add Volta (7.0) if CUDA >= 9.0
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 9 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 70 72"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 70 72"
+fi
+
+# Add Turing (7.5) if CUDA >= 10.0
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 10 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 75"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 75"
+fi
+
+# Add Ampere (8.0, 8.6) if CUDA >= 11.0
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 11 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 80 86"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 80 86"
+fi
+
+# Add Ada Lovelace (8.9) and Hopper (9.0) if CUDA >= 12.0
+if [ "$CUDA_VERSION" -ge 12 ]; then
+    COMPUTE_LIST="$COMPUTE_LIST 89 90"
+    SM_LIST="$SM_LIST 89 90"
+fi
+
+# Generate NVCC flags
+GENCODE_FLAGS=""
+for compute in $COMPUTE_LIST; do
+    GENCODE_FLAGS="$GENCODE_FLAGS -gencode arch=compute_$compute,code=compute_$compute"
+done
+
+for sm in $SM_LIST; do
+    GENCODE_FLAGS="$GENCODE_FLAGS -gencode arch=compute_$sm,code=sm_$sm"
+done
+
+echo "$GENCODE_FLAGS" 
\ No newline at end of file

 CUDA ?= /usr/local/cuda
 NVCC ?= $(CUDA)/bin/nvcc
+GET_CUDA_GENCODE ?= ../scripts/get_cuda_gencode.sh

@@ -13,7 +14,10 @@ LDFLAGS  := $(CUDA_LIB) -L $(CUDA)/lib64 -L $(GDRAPI_SRC)
 COMMONCFLAGS := -O2
 CFLAGS   += $(COMMONCFLAGS)
 CXXFLAGS += $(COMMONCFLAGS)
-NVCCFLAGS ?= -arch compute_75 -code compute_75,sm_75

+NVCCFLAGS ?= $(shell $(GET_CUDA_GENCODE) $(NVCC))
+

patch:
commit 16e93a22d96cae3e3f6e6366ae8db6955b89f2c8
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Feb 4 21:28:25 2025 +0000

    Add scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh and fix proc_ops not available bug on old linux kernel
---
 scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh | 80 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile                  |  6 +++
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c                  | 18 ++++++++
 3 files changed, 104 insertions(+)

diff --git a/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..dbdb3fb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+show_help()
+{
+    echo "Usage: ${0} [-hk]"
+    echo
+    echo "  -h          Show this help text."
+    echo "  -k <kver>   Specify the kernel version."
+    echo
+}
+
+set_kver=0
+kver=""
+
+OPTIND=1    # Reset in case getopts has been used previously in the shell.
+while getopts "hk:" opt ; do
+    case "${opt}" in
+        h)
+            show_help
+            exit 0
+            ;;
+        k)
+            set_kver=1
+            kver="${OPTARG}"
+            ;;
+        ?)
+            show_help
+            exit 0
+            ;;
+    esac
+done
+
+if [ ${set_kver} -eq 0 ]; then
+    kver="$(uname -r)"
+fi
+
+kdir="/lib/modules/${kver}/build"
+
+tmpfolder=$(mktemp --tmpdir -d gdrcopy.XXXXXXXXX)
+
+testfile="${tmpfolder}/test-dummy.c"
+makefile="${tmpfolder}/Makefile"
+
+cat >${testfile} <<EOF
+#include <linux/module.h>
+#include <linux/mm.h>
+static int __init test_dummy_init(void)
+{
+    struct proc_ops pops;
+    return 0;
+}
+
+static void __exit test_dummy_fini(void)
+{
+}
+
+MODULE_AUTHOR("gpudirect@nvidia.com");
+MODULE_LICENSE("MIT");
+MODULE_VERSION("1.0");
+
+module_init(test_dummy_init);
+module_exit(test_dummy_fini);
+EOF
+
+cat >${makefile} <<EOF
+obj-m := test-dummy.o
+EOF
+
+cd ${tmpfolder}
+make -C ${kdir} M=${tmpfolder} modules > /dev/null 2>&1
+ret=$?
+
+rm -rf ${tmpfolder}
+
+if [ "${ret}" -eq 0 ]; then
+    echo "y"
+else
+    echo "n"
+fi
+

+export HAVE_PROC_OPS ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_PROC_OPS.sh -k $(KVER))

 	@ echo "Picking NVIDIA driver sources from NVIDIA_SRC_DIR=$(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR). If that does not meet your expectation, you might have a stale driver still around and that might cause problems."
 	@ echo "Setting NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE=$(NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE)"

+	@ echo "Setting HAVE_PROC_OPS=$(HAVE_PROC_OPS)"
 	@ $(MAKE) -C $(KDIR) $(MAKE_PARAMS) M=$(PWD) modules
 
 install: build

               << ":" << std::setfill('0') << std::setw(2) << dev_pci_device_id
@@ -406,7 +406,7 @@ int main(int argc, char *argv[])
                  << "We report the round-trip time from when CPU starts writing the data until it observes the notification from GPU." << endl
                  << endl;
 
-            cout << "Running " << num_iters << " iterations with data size " 
+            cout << "Running " << num_iters << " iterations with data size "
                  << data_size << " bytes and flag size " << sizeof(*g_gpu_flag_buf) << " bytes."
                  << endl;

 %changelog
+* Mon Dec 16 2024 Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com> 2.4.4-%{_release}
+- Fix the use-after-free bug of mr objects in gdrdv_vma_close.
+- Fix the resource leakage bug in gdrdrv_release.
 * Mon Dec 02 2024 Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com> 2.4.3-%{_release}
 - Fix NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE detection when compile with NVIDIA driver version 545 or newer.
 * Thu Oct 31 2024 Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com> 2.4.2-%{_release}
diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
index 7a8b044..43017d4 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
@@ -499,6 +499,7 @@ static void gdr_free_mr_unlocked(gdr_mr_t *mr)
             gdr_err("nvidia_p2p_put_pages error %d, async callback may have been fired\n", status);
         }
         #endif
+
     } else {
         gdr_dbg("invoking unpin_buffer while callback has already been fired\n");
 
@@ -527,11 +528,6 @@ static int gdrdrv_release(struct inode *inode, struct file *filp)
         gdr_err("filp contains no info\n");
         return -EIO;
     }
-    // Check that the caller is the same process that did gdrdrv_open
-    if (!gdrdrv_check_same_process(info, current)) {
-        gdr_dbg("filp is not opened by the current process\n");
-        return -EACCES;
-    }
 
     mutex_lock(&info->lock);
     list_for_each_safe(p, n, &info->mr_list) {
@@ -1142,11 +1138,27 @@ static long gdrdrv_unlocked_ioctl(struct file *filp, unsigned int cmd, unsigned
 
 void gdrdrv_vma_close(struct vm_area_struct *vma)
 {
-    gdr_mr_t *mr = (gdr_mr_t *)vma->vm_private_data;
-    gdr_dbg("closing vma=0x%px vm_file=0x%px vm_private_data=0x%px mr=0x%px mr->vma=0x%px\n", vma, vma->vm_file, vma->vm_private_data, mr, mr->vma);
+    gdr_hnd_t handle;
+    gdr_mr_t *mr = NULL;
+    gdr_info_t* info = NULL;
+
+    if (!vma->vm_file)
+        return;
+
+    info = vma->vm_file->private_data;
+    if (!info)
+        return;
+
+    handle = gdrdrv_handle_from_off(vma->vm_pgoff);
+    mr = gdr_get_mr_from_handle_write(info, handle);
+    if (!mr)
+        return;
+
+    gdr_dbg("closing vma=0x%px vm_file=0x%px mr=0x%px mr->vma=0x%px\n", vma, vma->vm_file, mr, mr->vma);
     // TODO: handle multiple vma's
     mr->vma = NULL;
     mr->cpu_mapping_type = GDR_MR_NONE;
+    gdr_put_mr_write(mr);
 }
 
 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
@@ -1306,8 +1318,6 @@ static int gdrdrv_mmap(struct file *filp, struct vm_area_struct *vma)
     // Set to None first
     mr->cpu_mapping_type = GDR_MR_NONE;
     vma->vm_ops = &gdrdrv_vm_ops;
-    gdr_dbg("overwriting vma->vm_private_data=%px with mr=%px\n", vma->vm_private_data, mr);
-    vma->vm_private_data = mr;
 
     // check for physically contiguous IO ranges
     p = 0;

message: extend documentation for FORCE_PCIE flag
patch:
commit 02aa31b59de8a0d96f809c9bf807bb260f411998
Author: Davide Rossetti <drossetti@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu Nov 7 02:29:04 2024 +0000

    extend documentation for FORCE_PCIE flag
---
 include/gdrapi.h | 10 ++++++----
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/include/gdrapi.h b/include/gdrapi.h
index 9fb7773..de4fd77 100644
--- a/include/gdrapi.h
+++ b/include/gdrapi.h
@@ -87,10 +87,12 @@ typedef enum gdr_pin_flags {
 
 // P2P tokens are deprecated, so dropping them here
 // supported flags:
-// - GDR_PIN_FLAG_DEFAULT default mapping mechanism
-// - GDR_PIN_FLAG_FORCE_PCIE,
-//   force creation of a GPU BAR1 mapping on coherent platforms
-//   only supported when persistent mapping is enabled, returns EINVAL otherwise
+// - GDR_PIN_FLAG_DEFAULT, default mapping mechanism
+// - GDR_PIN_FLAG_FORCE_PCIE, forces creation of a GPU BAR1 mapping
+//   supported on specific coherent platforms only
+//   persistent mappings must be enabled
+//   requires GPU driver r570+ at run time
+//   returns EINVAL otherwise
 int gdr_pin_buffer_v2(gdr_t g, unsigned long addr, size_t size, uint32_t flags, gdr_mh_t *handle);
 
 // Destroys the peer-to-peer mapping and frees the handle.

author: Davide Rossetti
message: turn CHECK_EQ into a warning
patch:
commit 4cc454f4b0656b46d945d74b2777b4b231bdb131
Author: Davide Rossetti <drossetti@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Sep 20 02:16:33 2024 +0000

    turn CHECK_EQ into a warning
---
 tests/common.hpp | 11 ++++++++++-
 1 file changed, 10 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/tests/common.hpp b/tests/common.hpp
index 8e01dcc..873c0f3 100644
--- a/tests/common.hpp
+++ b/tests/common.hpp
@@ -72,6 +72,15 @@
 
 #define EXIT_WAIVED 2
 
+#define CHECK(x)                                                       \
+    do                                                                  \
+        {                                                               \
+            if (!(x))                                                   \
+                {                                                       \
+                    fprintf(stderr, "Check \"%s\" failed at %s:%d\n", #x, __FILE__, __LINE__); \
+                }                                                       \
+        } while (0)
+
 #define ASSERT(x)                                                       \
     do                                                                  \
         {                                                               \
@@ -95,7 +104,7 @@
         } while (0)
 
 #define ASSERT_EQ(P, V) ASSERT((P) == (V))
-#define CHECK_EQ(P, V) ASSERT((P) == (V))
+#define CHECK_EQ(P, V) CHECK((P) == (V))
 #define ASSERT_NEQ(P, V) ASSERT(!((P) == (V)))
 #define BREAK_IF_NEQ(P, V) if((P) != (V)) break
 #define BEGIN_CHECK do

author: Pak Markthub
message: Modify rpm package creation to support the new gdrdrv Makefile
patch:
commit 428e8fac92077987a4df07348efbaf5b82c144ec
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Nov 29 02:56:44 2024 +0000

    Modify rpm package creation to support the new gdrdrv Makefile
---
 packages/build-rpm-packages.sh | 2 +-
 packages/gdrcopy.spec          | 2 ++
 2 files changed, 3 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
index 698110c..42fe77a 100755
--- a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ ex cd ${TOP_DIR_PATH}
 
 ex mkdir -p $tmpdir/gdrcopy
 ex rm -rf $tmpdir/gdrcopy/*
-ex cp -r packages/dkms.conf packages/rhel/init.d packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service insmod.sh Makefile README.md include src tests config_arch LICENSE packages/gdrcopy.spec $tmpdir/gdrcopy/
+ex cp -r packages/dkms.conf packages/rhel/init.d packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service scripts/ insmod.sh Makefile README.md include src tests config_arch LICENSE packages/gdrcopy.spec $tmpdir/gdrcopy/
 ex rm -f $tmpdir/gdrcopy-$VERSION.tar.gz
 
 ex cd $tmpdir/gdrcopy
diff --git a/packages/gdrcopy.spec b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
index 1013648..8cf51a0 100644
--- a/packages/gdrcopy.spec
+++ b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
@@ -182,6 +182,7 @@ cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.h $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr
 cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/src/gdrdrv/Makefile $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/
 cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/src/gdrdrv/nv-p2p-dummy.c $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/
 cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/dkms.conf $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}
+cp -a -r $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/scripts $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/
 
 %if 0%{!?suse_version:1}
 # RHEL
@@ -341,6 +342,7 @@ rm -rf $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}
 %{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/Makefile
 %{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/nv-p2p-dummy.c
 %{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/dkms.conf
+%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}/scripts/*
 
 
 %if %{BUILD_KMOD} > 0

author: Pak Markthub
message: Modify dkms deb package to support the new gdrdrv Makefile
patch:
commit 736275dba4cc43ff9145b50e9c2124891a2dca77
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Nov 29 02:41:41 2024 +0000

    Modify dkms deb package to support the new gdrdrv Makefile
---
 packages/build-deb-packages.sh | 1 +
 packages/dkms.conf             | 1 +
 packages/dkms/Makefile         | 3 +++
 3 files changed, 5 insertions(+)

diff --git a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
index 416557b..aa69e5a 100755
--- a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
@@ -185,6 +185,7 @@ if [[ ${build_driver_package} == 1 ]]; then
     ex cp -r ${tmpdir}/gdrcopy/src/gdrdrv ${dkmsdir}/gdrdrv-${VERSION}
     ex rm -rf ${dkmsdir}/gdrdrv-${VERSION}/debian-*
     ex cp ${SCRIPT_DIR_PATH}/dkms.conf ${dkmsdir}/gdrdrv-${VERSION}/
+    ex cp -r ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/scripts ${dkmsdir}/gdrdrv-${VERSION}
     ex cd ${dkmsdir}
     ex cp -r ${SCRIPT_DIR_PATH}/dkms/* .
     ex find . -type f -exec sed -i "s/@FULL_VERSION@/${FULL_VERSION}/g" {} +
diff --git a/packages/dkms.conf b/packages/dkms.conf
index e012a68..627e4d2 100644
--- a/packages/dkms.conf
+++ b/packages/dkms.conf
@@ -3,3 +3,4 @@ PACKAGE_VERSION="@FULL_VERSION@"
 BUILT_MODULE_NAME[0]="gdrdrv"
 DEST_MODULE_LOCATION[0]="@MODULE_LOCATION@"
 AUTOINSTALL="yes"
+MAKE[0]="cd $dkms_tree/gdrdrv/@FULL_VERSION@/build && make CONF_SCRIPT_DIR=scripts KVER=$kernelver"
diff --git a/packages/dkms/Makefile b/packages/dkms/Makefile
index 598c4c8..47be3e4 100644
--- a/packages/dkms/Makefile
+++ b/packages/dkms/Makefile
@@ -15,6 +15,9 @@ ifeq ("$(wildcard $(NAME)-$(VERSION))", "$(NAME)-$(VERSION)")
 
 	# sets 0755 for dirs, 0644 for files
 	chmod a-wx+rX,u+w -R "$(SRC)/$(NAME)-$(VERSION)"
+
+	# set u+x for all files under the scripts folder
+	chmod u+x -R "$(SRC)/$(NAME)-$(VERSION)/scripts"
 endif
 
 #tarball, possibly with binaries

author: Pak Markthub
message: Introduce CONF_SCRIPT_DIR to the gdrdrv Makefile
patch:
commit 96f2fe4af76029c3afcb51a6b06c5c63674b73de
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Fri Nov 29 02:40:38 2024 +0000

    Introduce CONF_SCRIPT_DIR to the gdrdrv Makefile
---
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile | 4 +++-
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index 2b40642..257fcd6 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -46,7 +46,9 @@ DEPMOD := /sbin/depmod
 
 export NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
 export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
-export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET := $(shell ../../scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
+
+CONF_SCRIPT_DIR ?= $(PWD)/../../scripts
+export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET ?= $(shell $(CONF_SCRIPT_DIR)/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh -k $(KVER))
 
 all: build

author: Pak Markthub
message: Add the master branch entry to CHANGELOG.md. It contains changes that are not yet available in any releases.
patch:
commit 294f270bdfa9db0705a17fe55beb6cbc44813eee
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Nov 27 23:02:47 2024 -0800

    Add the master branch entry to CHANGELOG.md. It contains changes that are not yet available in any releases.
---
 CHANGELOG.md | 7 +++++++
 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+)

diff --git a/CHANGELOG.md b/CHANGELOG.md
index f5d0467..0546ffd 100644
--- a/CHANGELOG.md
+++ b/CHANGELOG.md
@@ -1,5 +1,11 @@
 # Changelog
 
+## [master]
+- Waive some unit tests in gdrcopy\_sanity if the GPU compute mode is not set as default.
+- Introduce gdr\_get\_attribute API and GDR\_ATTR\_USE\_PERSISTENT\_MAPPING.
+- Add persistent mapping support in gdrcopy\_sanity.
+- Support setting GPU ID in gdrcopy\_sanity.
+
 ## [2.4.3] - 2024-12-02
 - Fix NVIDIA\_IS\_OPENSOURCE detection when compile with NVIDIA driver version 545 or newer.
 - Fix compile error in gdrdrv when compile on RHEL9.5.
@@ -92,6 +98,7 @@
 - Add a script for packaging gdrcopy in the rpm format.
 
 
+[master]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy
 [2.4.3]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.3
 [2.4.2]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.2
 [2.4.1]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.1

author: Pak Markthub
message: Merge CHANGELOG.md from R2.4
patch:
commit 12215bc45bc6e300f034161d87b41182fa7470c9
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Nov 27 23:02:15 2024 -0800

    Merge CHANGELOG.md from R2.4
---
 CHANGELOG.md | 17 +++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 17 insertions(+)

diff --git a/CHANGELOG.md b/CHANGELOG.md
index 42a03d4..f5d0467 100644
--- a/CHANGELOG.md
+++ b/CHANGELOG.md
@@ -1,5 +1,19 @@
 # Changelog
 
+## [2.4.3] - 2024-12-02
+- Fix NVIDIA\_IS\_OPENSOURCE detection when compile with NVIDIA driver version 545 or newer.
+- Fix compile error in gdrdrv when compile on RHEL9.5.
+
+## [2.4.2] - 2024-10-31
+- Fix the size alignment bug in gdrdrv.
+- Fix memory leak in gdr\_pin\_buffer.
+- Add support for another flavor of BF3.
+
+## [2.4.1] - 2023-12-18
+- Add support for persistent mapping.
+- Fix bug in src/gdrdrv/Makefile.
+- Fix compile-time bug when check.h is not found.
+
 ## [2.4] - 2023-09-19
 - Various bug fixes in the test and benchmark applications.
 - Prefix all applications with "gdrcopy\_".
@@ -78,6 +92,9 @@
 - Add a script for packaging gdrcopy in the rpm format.
 
 
+[2.4.3]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.3
+[2.4.2]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.2
+[2.4.1]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4.1
 [2.4]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.4
 [2.3.1]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.3.1
 [2.3]: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gdrcopy/releases/tag/v2.3

author: Pak Markthub
message: Bump up version to 2.4.3
patch:
commit f1b17731b36b879c38fe0b54bcb1a1d253903de9
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Nov 27 20:48:40 2024 -0800

    Bump up version to 2.4.3
---
 packages/build-deb-packages.sh | 2 +-
 packages/build-rpm-packages.sh | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
index 5338d1c..416557b 100755
--- a/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-deb-packages.sh
@@ -96,7 +96,7 @@ MODULE_SUBDIR=$(awk '/MODULE_SUBDIR \?=/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/src/gdrdr
 
 MAJOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 MINOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
-VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.2"
+VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.3"
 if [ "X$VERSION" == "X" ]; then
     echo "Failed to get version numbers!" >&2
     exit 1
diff --git a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
index 2f1f15e..698110c 100755
--- a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
+++ b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ MODULE_SUBDIR=$(awk '/MODULE_SUBDIR \?=/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/src/gdrdr
 
 MAJOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MAJOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
 MINOR_VERSION=$(awk '/#define GDR_API_MINOR_VERSION/ { print $3 }' ${TOP_DIR_PATH}/include/gdrapi.h | tr -d '\n')
-VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.2"
+VERSION="${MAJOR_VERSION}.${MINOR_VERSION}.3"
 if [ "X$VERSION" == "X" ]; then
     echo "Failed to get version numbers!" >&2
     exit 1

author: Pak Markthub
message: Improve vm_flags_set detection mechanism used when compiling gdrdrv
patch:
commit 496b3beb1b17cbaa597eabfc48eb3a9c379dc3f7
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Nov 25 08:46:36 2024 +0000

    Improve vm_flags_set detection mechanism used when compiling gdrdrv
---
 scripts/makefile-template                | 26 ++++++++++++++++++
 scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh | 46 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile                      | 12 ++++++---
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c                      |  2 +-
 4 files changed, 82 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/makefile-template b/scripts/makefile-template
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5497191
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/makefile-template
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)
+
+kver_major:=$(shell echo $(KERNELRELEASE) | awk -F '.' '// { print $$2;}' )
+
+obj-m := test-dummy.o
+
+else
+
+KVER ?= $(shell uname -r)
+MODULES_DIR := /lib/modules/$(KVER)
+KDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/build
+MODULE_SUBDIR ?= /kernel/drivers/misc/
+MODULE_DESTDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/$(MODULE_SUBDIR)
+DEPMOD := /sbin/depmod
+
+REL := $(subst ., , $(subst -, , $(shell uname -r)))
+REL_MAJOR  := $(word 1,$(REL))
+REL_MEDIUM := $(word 2,$(REL))
+REL_MINOR  := $(word 3,$(REL))
+
+all: build
+
+build:
+	$(MAKE) -C $(KDIR) $(MAKE_PARAMS) M=$(PWD) modules
+
+endif
diff --git a/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..a580f8f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+scriptdir="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")")" && pwd)"
+
+tmpfolder=$(mktemp --tmpdir -d gdrcopy.XXXXXXXXX)
+
+testfile="${tmpfolder}/test-dummy.c"
+makefile="${tmpfolder}/Makefile"
+
+cat >${testfile} <<EOF
+#include <linux/module.h>
+#include <linux/mm.h>
+static int __init test_dummy_init(void)
+{
+    struct vm_area_struct vma;
+    vm_flags_set(&vma, 0);
+    return 0;
+}
+
+static void __exit test_dummy_fini(void)
+{
+}
+
+MODULE_AUTHOR("gpudirect@nvidia.com");
+MODULE_LICENSE("MIT");
+MODULE_VERSION("1.0");
+
+module_init(test_dummy_init);
+module_exit(test_dummy_fini);
+EOF
+
+cp "${scriptdir}/makefile-template" ${makefile}
+
+cd ${tmpfolder}
+make > /dev/null 2>&1 
+ret=$?
+
+cd ${scriptdir}
+rm -rf ${tmpfolder}
+
+if [ "${ret}" -eq 0 ]; then
+    echo "y"
+else
+    echo "n"
+fi
+
diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index fc39384..c0ee7fa 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -18,9 +18,6 @@
 # FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER
 # DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
 
-NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
-NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
-
 ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)
 
 kver_major:=$(shell echo $(KERNELRELEASE) | awk -F '.' '// { print $$2;}' )
@@ -34,8 +31,16 @@ ifeq ($(NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE),y)
 ccflags-y += -DGDRDRV_OPENSOURCE_NVIDIA
 endif
 
+ifeq ($(HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET),y)
+ccflags-y += -DGDRDRV_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET
+endif
+
 else
 
+export NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
+export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET := $(shell ../../scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh)
+
 KVER ?= $(shell uname -r)
 MODULES_DIR := /lib/modules/$(KVER)
 KDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/build
@@ -53,6 +58,7 @@ all: build
 build:
 	@ echo "Picking NVIDIA driver sources from NVIDIA_SRC_DIR=$(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR). If that does not meet your expectation, you might have a stale driver still around and that might cause problems."
 	@ echo "Setting NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE=$(NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE)"
+	@ echo "Setting HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET=$(HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET)"
 	@ $(MAKE) -C $(KDIR) $(MAKE_PARAMS) M=$(PWD) modules
 
 install: build
diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
index 9598c39..7a8b044 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c
@@ -101,7 +101,7 @@ void address_space_init_once(struct address_space *mapping)
 #endif
 
 
-#if LINUX_VERSION_CODE < KERNEL_VERSION(6,3,0)
+#ifndef GDRDRV_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET
 /**
  * This API requires Linux kernel 6.3.
  * See https://github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/bc292ab00f6c7a661a8a605c714e8a148f629ef6

author: Pak Markthub
message: Improve vm_flags_set detection mechanism used when compiling gdrdrv
patch:
commit cfb71006cd7374afb98782b82fa8518155fac8c5
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Nov 25 08:46:36 2024 +0000

    Improve vm_flags_set detection mechanism used when compiling gdrdrv
---
 scripts/makefile-template                | 26 ++++++++++++++++++
 scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh | 46 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile                      | 12 ++++++---
 src/gdrdrv/gdrdrv.c                      |  2 +-
 4 files changed, 82 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/scripts/makefile-template b/scripts/makefile-template
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5497191
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/makefile-template
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)
+
+kver_major:=$(shell echo $(KERNELRELEASE) | awk -F '.' '// { print $$2;}' )
+
+obj-m := test-dummy.o
+
+else
+
+KVER ?= $(shell uname -r)
+MODULES_DIR := /lib/modules/$(KVER)
+KDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/build
+MODULE_SUBDIR ?= /kernel/drivers/misc/
+MODULE_DESTDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/$(MODULE_SUBDIR)
+DEPMOD := /sbin/depmod
+
+REL := $(subst ., , $(subst -, , $(shell uname -r)))
+REL_MAJOR  := $(word 1,$(REL))
+REL_MEDIUM := $(word 2,$(REL))
+REL_MINOR  := $(word 3,$(REL))
+
+all: build
+
+build:
+	$(MAKE) -C $(KDIR) $(MAKE_PARAMS) M=$(PWD) modules
+
+endif
diff --git a/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh
new file mode 100755
index 0000000..a580f8f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+scriptdir="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")")" && pwd)"
+
+tmpfolder=$(mktemp --tmpdir -d gdrcopy.XXXXXXXXX)
+
+testfile="${tmpfolder}/test-dummy.c"
+makefile="${tmpfolder}/Makefile"
+
+cat >${testfile} <<EOF
+#include <linux/module.h>
+#include <linux/mm.h>
+static int __init test_dummy_init(void)
+{
+    struct vm_area_struct vma;
+    vm_flags_set(&vma, 0);
+    return 0;
+}
+
+static void __exit test_dummy_fini(void)
+{
+}
+
+MODULE_AUTHOR("gpudirect@nvidia.com");
+MODULE_LICENSE("MIT");
+MODULE_VERSION("1.0");
+
+module_init(test_dummy_init);
+module_exit(test_dummy_fini);
+EOF
+
+cp "${scriptdir}/makefile-template" ${makefile}
+
+cd ${tmpfolder}
+make > /dev/null 2>&1 
+ret=$?
+
+cd ${scriptdir}
+rm -rf ${tmpfolder}
+
+if [ "${ret}" -eq 0 ]; then
+    echo "y"
+else
+    echo "n"
+fi
+
diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index fc39384..c0ee7fa 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -18,9 +18,6 @@
 # FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER
 # DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
 
-NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
-NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
-
 ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)
 
 kver_major:=$(shell echo $(KERNELRELEASE) | awk -F '.' '// { print $$2;}' )
@@ -34,8 +31,16 @@ ifeq ($(NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE),y)
 ccflags-y += -DGDRDRV_OPENSOURCE_NVIDIA
 endif
 
+ifeq ($(HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET),y)
+ccflags-y += -DGDRDRV_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET
+endif
+
 else
 
+export NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
+export NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
+export HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET := $(shell ../../scripts/test_gdrdrv_HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET.sh)
+
 KVER ?= $(shell uname -r)
 MODULES_DIR := /lib/modules/$(KVER)
 KDIR := $(MODULES_DIR)/build
@@ -53,6 +58,7 @@ all: build
 build:
 	@ echo "Picking NVIDIA driver sources from NVIDIA_SRC_DIR=$(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR). If that does not meet your expectation, you might have a stale driver still around and that might cause problems."
 	@ echo "Setting NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE=$(NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE)"
+	@ echo "Setting HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET=$(HAVE_VM_FLAGS_SET)"
 	@ $(MAKE) -C $(KDIR) $(MAKE_PARAMS) M=$(PWD) modules
 
 install: build

index 734673b..2ce4979 100644

@@ -101,7 +101,7 @@ void address_space_init_once(struct address_space *mapping)
 #endif
 
 
-#if LINUX_VERSION_CODE < KERNEL_VERSION(6,3,0)

 /**

message: Print out if persistent mapping will be used in dmesg

author: Davide Rossetti
message: fix build for OpenRM variant
patch:
commit d44edc3489af6445a7618a25deab0d59f262ab48
Author: Davide Rossetti <drossetti@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Oct 3 21:26:31 2023 +0000

    fix build for OpenRM variant
    
    nvidia-x.y/nvidia-peermem/ contains a copy of nv-p2p.h, so it may get picked as NVIDIA_SRC_DIR.
    Later nv-frontend.c is searched there and cannot be found because it is located in a different subdir.
    The fix is to search for nv-p2p.c, which is colocated along with nv-frontend.c.
---
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index fd8cfaf..2c84000 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
 # FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER
 # DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
 
-NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.h" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
+NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
 NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -q "MODULE_LICENSE(\"Dual MIT/GPL\")" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/nv-frontend.c && echo "y")
 
 ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)

 NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
-NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -s -q "MODULE_LICENSE(\"Dual MIT/GPL\")" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/nv-frontend.c $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/nv.c && echo "y")
+NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -r "MODULE_LICENSE" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/ | grep -s -q "GPL" && echo "y")
 
 ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)

author: Davide Rossetti
message: fix build for OpenRM variant
patch:
commit 0fbdb28e16dd7bd3ba089e83a28f31326dd8f3bd
Author: Davide Rossetti <drossetti@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Oct 3 21:26:31 2023 +0000

    fix build for OpenRM variant
    
    nvidia-x.y/nvidia-peermem/ contains a copy of nv-p2p.h, so it may get picked as NVIDIA_SRC_DIR.
    Later nv-frontend.c is searched there and cannot be found because it is located in a different subdir.
    The fix is to search for nv-p2p.c, which is colocated along with nv-frontend.c.
---
 src/gdrdrv/Makefile | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
index fd8cfaf..2c84000 100644
--- a/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
+++ b/src/gdrdrv/Makefile
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
 # FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER
 # DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
 
-NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.h" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
+NVIDIA_SRC_DIR ?= $(shell { find /usr/src/kernel-modules/nvidia-* /usr/src/nvidia-* -name "nv-p2p.c" -print -quit | xargs dirname || echo "NVIDIA_DRIVER_MISSING"; } 2>/dev/null)
 NVIDIA_IS_OPENSOURCE ?= $(shell grep -q "MODULE_LICENSE(\"Dual MIT/GPL\")" $(NVIDIA_SRC_DIR)/nv-frontend.c && echo "y")
 
 ifneq ($(KERNELRELEASE),)

author: Pak Markthub
message: Updated README regarding loading unsupported modules on SLE
patch:
commit d004c39be54e17e54910e25724e3ed49b37450a1
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>

 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+)

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index ddb272a..19cbb78 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -466,6 +466,10 @@ GDRCopy does not fully support Linux with the confidential computing (CC) config
 it does not functional if `CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_CC_PLATFORM=y` and CC is enabled at runtime. However, it works if CC is
 disabled or `CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_CC_PLATFORM=n`. This issue is not applied to AMD CPU.
 
+To allow the loading of unsupported 3rd party modules in SLE, set `allow_unsupported_modules 1` in
+/etc/modprobe.d/unsupported-modules. After making this change, modules missing the "supported" flag, will be allowed to
+load.
+
 
 ## Bug filing

author: Pak Markthub
message: Fixed bug from starting gdrcopy service on SUSE
patch:
commit 7ac0d5b9c204508c6dc2126561bf4147a6ea92e5
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Sep 5 01:31:59 2023 -0700

    Fixed bug from starting gdrcopy service on SUSE
---
 packages/gdrcopy.spec | 10 ++++++++++
 1 file changed, 10 insertions(+)

diff --git a/packages/gdrcopy.spec b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
index 8ea29d1..42c9440 100644
--- a/packages/gdrcopy.spec
+++ b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
@@ -27,31 +27,41 @@
 %endif
 
 %define gdrcopy_service_install_script                                  \
+%if 0%{!?suse_version:1}                                                \
+# RHEL                                                                  \
 %if 0%{?rhel} >= 9                                                      \
 if [ -e /usr/bin/systemctl ]; then                                      \
     /usr/bin/systemctl enable gdrcopy||:                                \
     /usr/bin/systemctl start gdrcopy||:                                 \
 fi                                                                      \
 %else                                                                   \
+# RHEL 8 or earlier                                                     \
 if ! ( /sbin/chkconfig --del gdrcopy > /dev/null 2>&1 ); then           \
    true                                                                 \
 fi                                                                      \
 /sbin/chkconfig --add gdrcopy                                           \
 service gdrcopy start                                                   \
+%endif                                                                  \
+# No service for SUSE                                                   \
 %endif
 
 %define gdrcopy_service_uninstall_script                                \
+%if 0%{!?suse_version:1}                                                \
+# RHEL                                                                  \
 %if 0%{?rhel} >= 9                                                      \
 if [ -e /usr/bin/systemctl ]; then                                      \
     /usr/bin/systemctl stop gdrcopy||:                                  \
     /usr/bin/systemctl disable gdrcopy||:                               \
 fi                                                                      \
 %else                                                                   \
+# RHEL 8 or earlier                                                     \
 service gdrcopy stop||:                                                 \
 %{MODPROBE} -rq gdrdrv||:                                               \
 if ! ( /sbin/chkconfig --del gdrcopy > /dev/null 2>&1 ); then           \
    true                                                                 \
 fi                                                                      \
+%endif                                                                  \
+# No service for SUSE                                                   \
 %endif

author: Pak Markthub
message: Moved "gdrcopy" service script to /usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy on RHEL9
patch:
commit 11cdc9f5c34e1ef8e7b4c7e1a72e6788834cb007
Author: Pak Markthub <pmarkthub@nvidia.com>
Date:   Thu Aug 31 20:13:38 2023 -0700

    Moved "gdrcopy" service script to /usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy on RHEL9
---
 packages/gdrcopy.spec         | 22 +++++++++++++++++-----
 packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service |  6 +++---
 2 files changed, 20 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)

diff --git a/packages/gdrcopy.spec b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
index 2b5e283..8ea29d1 100644
--- a/packages/gdrcopy.spec
+++ b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
@@ -172,17 +172,22 @@ cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/src/gdrdrv/nv-p2p-dummy.c $RPM_BUILD_ROO
 cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/dkms.conf $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/gdrdrv-%{version}
 
 %if 0%{!?suse_version:1}
-# Install gdrdrv service script
-install -d $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
-install -m 0755 $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/init.d/gdrcopy $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
+# RHEL
 
 %if 0%{?rhel} >= 9
 # Install systemd service
+install -d $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/usr/libexec/gdrcopy
+install -m 0755 $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/init.d/gdrcopy $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/usr/libexec/gdrcopy
 install -d $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/usr/lib/systemd/system
 install -m 0644 $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/gdrcopy.service $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/usr/lib/systemd/system
+%else
+# RHEL8 or earlier
+# Install gdrdrv service script
+install -d $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
+install -m 0755 $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/init.d/gdrcopy $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
 %endif
 
-%else
+%else # SUSE
 mkdir -p $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/modprobe.d
 cat <<"EOF" > $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/modprobe.d/50-gdrdrv.conf
 #options gdrdrv dbg_enabled=1
@@ -310,9 +315,11 @@ rm -rf $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}
 %files %{dkms}
 %defattr(-,root,root,-)
 %if 0%{!?suse_version:1}
-/etc/init.d/gdrcopy
 %if 0%{?rhel} >= 9
+/usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy
 /usr/lib/systemd/system/gdrcopy.service
+%else
+/etc/init.d/gdrcopy
 %endif
 %else
 /etc/modprobe.d/50-gdrdrv.conf
@@ -328,7 +335,12 @@ rm -rf $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}
 %files %{kmod_fullname}
 %defattr(-,root,root,-)
 %if 0%{!?suse_version:1}
+%if 0%{?rhel} >= 9
+/usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy
+/usr/lib/systemd/system/gdrcopy.service
+%else
 /etc/init.d/gdrcopy
+%endif
 %else
 /etc/modprobe.d/50-gdrdrv.conf
 %endif
diff --git a/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service b/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service
index d1fde98..d1c8a9d 100644
--- a/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service
+++ b/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service
@@ -5,9 +5,9 @@ After=multi-user.target
 [Service]
 Type=oneshot
 RemainAfterExit=yes
-ExecStart=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy start
-ExecReload=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy restart
-ExecStop=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy stop
+ExecStart=/bin/bash /usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy start
+ExecReload=/bin/bash /usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy restart
+ExecStop=/bin/bash /usr/libexec/gdrcopy/gdrcopy stop
 
 [Install]
 WantedBy=multi-user.target

 - Add support for NVIDIA BLUEFIELD-3.
 - Add support for Linux kernel >= 6.3.
 - Add support for SLES and OpenSUSE.
+- Add support for systemd service on RHEL9.
 - Relicense gdrdrv to Dual MIT/GPL.

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md

-platforms are RHEL7, RHEL8, Ubuntu16_04, Ubuntu18_04, Ubuntu20_04,

+platforms are RHEL8, RHEL9, Ubuntu20\_04, Ubuntu22\_04,
 SLE-15 (any SP) and Leap 15.x.
 
 Root privileges are necessary to load/install the kernel-mode device
diff --git a/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh b/packages/build-rpm-packages.sh

+ex cp -r packages/dkms.conf packages/rhel/init.d packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service insmod.sh Makefile README.md include src tests config_arch LICENSE packages/gdrcopy.spec $tmpdir/gdrcopy/
 ex rm -f $tmpdir/gdrcopy-$VERSION.tar.gz
 
 ex cd $tmpdir/gdrcopy
diff --git a/packages/gdrcopy.spec b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
index 314412c..2b5e283 100644
--- a/packages/gdrcopy.spec
+++ b/packages/gdrcopy.spec
@@ -26,18 +26,40 @@
 %global kmod_fullname kmod-%{kmod_kernel_version}-%{NVIDIA_DRIVER_VERSION}
 %endif
 
-%define gdrdrv_install_script                                           \
-/sbin/depmod -a %{kernel_version} &> /dev/null ||:                      \
-%{MODPROBE} -rq gdrdrv||:                                               \
-%{MODPROBE} gdrdrv||:                                                   \
-                                                                        \
+%define gdrcopy_service_install_script                                  \
+%if 0%{?rhel} >= 9                                                      \
+if [ -e /usr/bin/systemctl ]; then                                      \
+    /usr/bin/systemctl enable gdrcopy||:                                \
+    /usr/bin/systemctl start gdrcopy||:                                 \
+fi                                                                      \
+%else                                                                   \
 if ! ( /sbin/chkconfig --del gdrcopy > /dev/null 2>&1 ); then           \
    true                                                                 \
 fi                                                                      \
-                                                                        \
 /sbin/chkconfig --add gdrcopy                                           \
-                                                                        \
-service gdrcopy start                                                    
+service gdrcopy start                                                   \
+%endif
+
+%define gdrcopy_service_uninstall_script                                \
+%if 0%{?rhel} >= 9                                                      \
+if [ -e /usr/bin/systemctl ]; then                                      \
+    /usr/bin/systemctl stop gdrcopy||:                                  \
+    /usr/bin/systemctl disable gdrcopy||:                               \
+fi                                                                      \
+%else                                                                   \
+service gdrcopy stop||:                                                 \
+%{MODPROBE} -rq gdrdrv||:                                               \
+if ! ( /sbin/chkconfig --del gdrcopy > /dev/null 2>&1 ); then           \
+   true                                                                 \
+fi                                                                      \
+%endif
+
+
+%define gdrdrv_install_script                                           \
+/sbin/depmod -a %{kernel_version} &> /dev/null ||:                      \
+%{MODPROBE} -rq gdrdrv||:                                               \
+%{MODPROBE} gdrdrv||:                                                   \
+%{gdrcopy_service_install_script}
 
 
 %global dkms_install_script                                             \
@@ -153,6 +175,13 @@ cp -a $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/dkms.conf $RPM_BUILD_ROOT%{usr_src_dir}/
 # Install gdrdrv service script
 install -d $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
 install -m 0755 $RPM_BUILD_DIR/%{name}-%{version}/init.d/gdrcopy $RPM_BUILD_ROOT/etc/init.d
+

+%endif

+- Add support for systemd service on RHEL9.
 - Relicense gdrdrv to Dual MIT/GPL.
 - Fix bugs in gdrdrv when pinning two small buffers back-to-back.
 - Add support for coherent platforms such as Grace-Hopper.
diff --git a/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service b/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d1fde98
--- /dev/null
+++ b/packages/rhel/gdrcopy.service
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=GDRCopy service
+After=multi-user.target
+
+[Service]
+Type=oneshot
+RemainAfterExit=yes
+ExecStart=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy start
+ExecReload=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy restart
+ExecStop=/bin/bash /etc/init.d/gdrcopy stop
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=multi-user.target
+

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e1903db
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/testsuites/testsuite.cpp
@@ -0,0 +1,238 @@
+/*
+ * Copyright (c) 2023, NVIDIA CORPORATION. All rights reserved.
+ *
+ * Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a
+ * copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"),

+ * all copies or substantial portions of the Software.
+ *
